summary_one_line: Input must carry the 4-byte FOURCC 'MCH2' (0x4D43 4832) at the color-space signature offset 0x10-0x13 to take the case cmsSigMCH2Data arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte color-space signature at offset 0x10-0x13 must equal the FOURCC 'MCH2' (bytes 4D 43 48 32). cmsChannelsOfColorSpace switches on this 32-bit ColorSpace value; the cmsSigMCH2Data arm is reached only on an exact match, so the input needs all four bytes M,C,H,2 simultaneously at those offsets.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Both winner-resolving seeds carry the literal 'MCH2' at offsets 0x10-0x13 (bytes 4D 43 48 32). The BYTE DIFF confirms W bytes are 4D/43/48/32 at 0x10/0x11/0x12/0x13 while concentrated, i.e. the winner inputs sit exactly on the magic FOURCC.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB ' (52 47 42 20) at offsets 0x10-0x13 instead of 'MCH2', so the switch falls into the cmsSigRgbData/3-channel arms (the L-hit case lines 889-898) and never reaches case cmsSigMCH2Data.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile intercepts the integer CMP comparing the 32-bit ColorSpace signature against the cmsSigMCH2Data constant and writes a Hamming-distance bucket into CMP_MAP; inputs whose signature is progressively closer to 'MCH2' add new CMP_MAP buckets and are preserved, giving value_profile a gradient toward the 4-byte match that naive's blind havoc cannot synthesize. This is CMP_MAP gradient feedback, not input-to-state substitution (value_profile has no I2S mutator).

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the cmsSigMCH2Data case arm of a switch on the color-space signature inside cmsChannelsOfColorSpace.
The enclosing function dispatches on ColorSpace via a switch, so the arm is selected by exact value match.
Winner-resolving seeds contain the literal ASCII 'MCH2' at the signature offset.
At offsets 0x10-0x13 the winner bytes are MCH2 (4D 43 48 32) while the loser bytes are RGB (52 47 42 20).
Loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB XYZ' at the signature offset, selecting a different (RGB/3-channel) arm of the switch.
The loser seeds resolve the cmsSigRgbData/3-channel arms (lines 889-898), not the MCH2 arm.
value_profile resolves the branch in all 10 trials while naive is blocked in all 10, the divergence attributable to value_profile's CMP feedback.
value_profile encodes how close the two CMP operands are as a CMP_MAP bucket, giving a similarity gradient toward the target constant.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The distance bucket is a coarse encoding of how close the two
operands were

evidence_trail.claim: An input closer to matching the CMP target adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus, enabling incremental progress toward the 4-byte match.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile uses no I2SRandReplace mutator, so the winner mechanism is CMP_MAP feedback rather than input-to-state substitution.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Claimed mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile), not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory I2S lineage query does not apply. The MECHANISM CONTEXT section confirms value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator and the seed metadata shows havoc/token mutation_ops only; the winner mechanism is value_profile's Hamming-distance CMP_MAP feedback closing the 4-byte FOURCC equality gate.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: If naive resolved a synthetic 4-byte-equality FOURCC switch gate at a rate comparable to value_profile (no significant value_profile advantage), the CMP_MAP-gradient attribution would be refuted, since the magic match would then be reachable by blind havoc alone.

weakest_evidence_point: The CMP_MAP gradient mechanism is inferred from technique knowledge plus byte evidence; the prompt provides no direct lineage trace showing value_profile incrementally narrowing the FOURCC operand distance.
